messages.text:
Join us for Social Coworking and office hours next week!

:grey_exclamation: Theme: Getting to know the DSLC
:hourglass_flowing_sand: When: Tuesday June 3rd 14:00 European Central (12:00 UTC)
:cookie: Hosted by: <@UNRAUCMTK> and community host <@U04BYALAGG1>

You can use this time for...
- General coworking
- Visit the <https://dslc.io|DSLC>
- Cowork independently on work related to R
- Chat with others for advice/resources

<https://ropensci.org/events/coworking-2025-06>

attachments.fallback: Social Coworking and Office Hours - Getting to know the DSLC
attachments.text: Get to know the Data Science Learning Community, chat, ask questions or work on something you need to get done!
